testcase.name: test_evite_copy_premium_past_event

failure.message: selenium.common.exceptions.JavascriptException: Message: javascript error: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'click') (Session info: chrome=133.0.6943.126) Stacktrace: GetHandleVerifier [0x00B20283+25139] (No symbol) [0x00AAB234] (No symbol) [0x009804A3] (No symbol) [0x00986EA1] (No symbol) [0x00989203] (No symbol) [0x00A0F6C5] (No symbol) [0x009ECF3C] (No symbol) [0x00A0E6E1] (No symbol) [0x009ECD36] (No symbol) [0x009BBD29] (No symbol) [0x009BD064] GetHandleVerifier [0x00E2B143+3215603] GetHandleVerifier [0x00E422BA+3310186] GetHandleVerifier [0x00E3C4D2+3286146] GetHandleVerifier [0x00BB9C80+654384] (No symbol) [0x00AB45BD] (No symbol) [0x00AB14A8] (No symbol) [0x00AB1647] (No symbol) [0x00AA3D20] BaseThreadInitThunk [0x75D05D49+25] RtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x7796CEBB+107] RtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7796CE41+561]

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_copy_premium_past_event.TestEviteCopyPremiumPastEvent object at 0x7f714b583050> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f714af17b60>
def test_evite_copy_premium_past_event(self, config): """ Copy premium past event: Select past event from DB Copy Change title, time, etc Update and Delete guest list, then update total guest list Send event Verify
:param config: :return: """
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3])
logger.info(f"Start {inspect.stack()[0][3]}")
page = config.pages["page"]
quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(inspect.stack()[0][3]) evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"] evite_event_page = config.pages["evite_event_page"] evite_overview = config.pages["evite_overview"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] step6_review_send = config.pages["step6_review_send"]
page.get_url(config.environment, "")
user_email_addr = "" user_pass = "" user_first_name = "" user_last_name = "" event_title = "" cursor = None
# Get event with event_date > 2023-04-01 which is fabric
psql_db = PostgreSQL(inspect.stack()[0][3]) db_connect = psql_db.connect_db()
if self._json_test_data["sign_in"]["email"]: user_email_addr = self._json_test_data["sign_in"]["email"] user_pass = self._json_test_data["sign_in_credentials"]["password"] else: sql_string = ( "SELECT %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s FROM %s WHERE event_create_date > '%s' " "AND event_sent_date > '%s'" "AND env = '%s' " "AND event_cancelled = '%s' " "AND event_premium = '%s' " "AND event_draft = '%s' " "AND event_draft_guests = '%s' " "AND created_by = '%s'" "ORDER BY random() LIMIT %s;" % ( "user_email_addr", "user_pass", "event_title", "event_id", "event_date", "event_premium", settings.DB_TABLE_EVENTS, "2023-04-01", "2023-04-01", settings.ENV, False, True, False, False, "evite", 1, ) )
try: cursor = db_connect.cursor() cursor.execute(sql_string)
# Check result first, if no data then don't fail: Skip if cursor.rowcount: user_email_addr, user_pass, event_title, event_id, event_date, event_premium = cursor.fetchone() else: msg = f"DB have no record for sql: {sql_string}" logger.warning(msg) pytest.skip(msg)
except psycopg2.DatabaseError as db_error: logger.error(f"Unable to execute sql: , {sql_string}, {db_error}") else: logger.info("SQL execute success")
# Log in with fetched user
# Log in with fetched user login_modal.sign_in(email=user_email_addr, password=user_pass)
# Get user's first and last name sql_string = psql_db.get_select_from_table_string( settings.DB_TABLE_USERS, ["user_first_name", "user_last_name"], user_email_addr=user_email_addr ) try: cursor = db_connect.cursor() cursor.execute(sql_string) if cursor.rowcount: user_first_name, user_last_name = cursor.fetchone() else: config.test_failed["value"] = False msg = f"DB have no record for sql: {sql_string}" logger.warning(msg) pytest.skip(msg) except psycopg2.DatabaseError as db_error: logger.error(f"Unable to execute sql: , {sql_string}, {db_error}") else: logger.info("SQL execute success") finally: db_connect.close() cursor.close()
evite_home_page.select_logged_in_menu(action="events")
# First verify event, we have bad data in db if not my_events.find_event(event_title=event_title, fail=False): # There is a mismatch between event and host, delete the row sql_string = "DELETE FROM %s WHERE user_email_addr = '%s';" % (settings.DB_TABLE_EVENTS, user_email_addr) psql_db.db_execute(sql_string)
config.test_failed["value"] = False pytest.skip(f"Can't find event {event_title}")
> my_events.select_event_options(event_title=event_title, event_option="copy_invitation", url="preview")
config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f714af17b60> cursor = <cursor object at 0x7f714b4fab60; closed: -1> db_connect = <connection object at 0x7f714b5efb00; dsn: 'user=jenkins password=xxx dbname=qatests host=34.133.6.167 port=5432', closed: 1> event_date = datetime.datetime(2023, 6, 6, 19, 0) event_id = '007FVW4XMOWFOQIKCEPN7MARXRWGKI' event_premium = True event_title = 'testCIYTSQ123test_20230525-063549' evite_event_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_event_page.EviteEventPage object at 0x7f714af17b90> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7f714af17c20> evite_overview = <commons.pages.evite.evite_overview.EviteOverview object at 0x7f714af15af0> logger = <Logger test_evite_copy_premium_past_event (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7f714af179b0> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7f714af16d50> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7f714af16690> psql_db = <lib.postgre_sql.PostgreSQL object at 0x7f714af17f20> quake_v3_event = <commons.pages.quake_v3.quake_v3_event.QuakeV3Event object at 0x7f714af17110> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_copy_premium_past_event.TestEviteCopyPremiumPastEvent object at 0x7f714b583050> sql_string = "SELECT user_first_name,user_last_name FROM public.evite_users WHERE user_email_addr = 'evite-05252023-063428-01-test@evitetest.com' ORDER BY random();" step1_template = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7f714af15f40> step5_guests = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7f714af17a70> step6_review_send = <commons.pages.evite.step6_review_send.Step6ReviewSend object at 0x7f714af15c10> user_email_addr = 'evite-05252023-063428-01-test@evitetest.com' user_first_name = 'automation' user_last_name = 'test' user_pass = 'test1234'

self = <selenium.webdriver.remote.errorhandler.ErrorHandler object at 0x7f714b4cef60> response = {'status': 500, 'value': '{"value":{"error":"javascript error","message":"javascript error: Cannot read properties of ...9+25]\\n\\tRtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x7796CEBB+107]\\n\\tRtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7796CE41+561]\\n"}}'}
def check_response(self, response: dict[str, Any]) -> None: """Checks that a JSON response from the WebDriver does not have an error.
:Args: - response - The JSON response from the WebDriver server as a dictionary object.
:Raises: If the response contains an error message. """ status = response.get("status", None) if not status or status == ErrorCode.SUCCESS: return value = None message = response.get("message", "") screen: str = response.get("screen", "") stacktrace = None if isinstance(status, int): value_json = response.get("value", None) if value_json and isinstance(value_json, str): try: value = json.loads(value_json) if isinstance(value, dict): if len(value) == 1: value = value["value"] status = value.get("error", None) if not status: status = value.get("status", ErrorCode.UNKNOWN_ERROR) message = value.get("value") or value.get("message") if not isinstance(message, str): value = message message = message.get("message") else: message = value.get("message", None) except ValueError: pass
exception_class: type[WebDriverException] e = ErrorCode() error_codes = [item for item in dir(e) if not item.startswith("__")] for error_code in error_codes: error_info = getattr(ErrorCode, error_code) if isinstance(error_info, list) and status in error_info: exception_class = getattr(ExceptionMapping, error_code, WebDriverException) break else: exception_class = WebDriverException
if not value: value = response["value"] if isinstance(value, str): raise exception_class(value) if message == "" and "message" in value: message = value["message"]
screen = None # type: ignore[assignment] if "screen" in value: screen = value["screen"]
stacktrace = None st_value = value.get("stackTrace") or value.get("stacktrace") if st_value: if isinstance(st_value, str): stacktrace = st_value.split("\n") else: stacktrace = [] try: for frame in st_value: line = frame.get("lineNumber", "") file = frame.get("fileName", "<anonymous>") if line: file = f"{file}:{line}" meth = frame.get("methodName", "<anonymous>") if "className" in frame: meth = f"{frame['className']}.{meth}" msg = " at %s (%s)" msg = msg % (meth, file) stacktrace.append(msg) except TypeError: pass if exception_class == UnexpectedAlertPresentException: alert_text = None if "data" in value: alert_text = value["data"].get("text") elif "alert" in value: alert_text = value["alert"].get("text") raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace, alert_text) # type: ignore[call-arg] # mypy is not smart enough here > raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.JavascriptException: Message: javascript error: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'click') E (Session info: chrome=133.0.6943.126) E Stacktrace: E GetHandleVerifier [0x00B20283+25139] E (No symbol) [0x00AAB234] E (No symbol) [0x009804A3] E (No symbol) [0x00986EA1] E (No symbol) [0x00989203] E (No symbol) [0x00A0F6C5] E (No symbol) [0x009ECF3C] E (No symbol) [0x00A0E6E1] E (No symbol) [0x009ECD36] E (No symbol) [0x009BBD29] E (No symbol) [0x009BD064] E GetHandleVerifier [0x00E2B143+3215603] E GetHandleVerifier [0x00E422BA+3310186] E GetHandleVerifier [0x00E3C4D2+3286146] E GetHandleVerifier [0x00BB9C80+654384] E (No symbol) [0x00AB45BD] E (No symbol) [0x00AB14A8] E (No symbol) [0x00AB1647] E (No symbol) [0x00AA3D20] E BaseThreadInitThunk [0x75D05D49+25] E RtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x7796CEBB+107] E RtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7796CE41+561]
